subject: Build History Screen
description: Create src/screens/HistoryScreen.tsx with entry list and filters. Create src/components/history/HistoryFilters.tsx with: date range picker (from/to), category multi-select dropdown, notes search input (debounced 300ms), duration range slider (min/max hours). Create src/components/history/EntryList.tsx using FlatList with infinite scroll, pull-to-refresh, empty state. Create src/components/history/EntryCard.tsx showing: category color chip, category type badge, date, start-end times, duration, notes preview (truncated), edit button. Use useInfiniteQuery with filters. Group entries by date with section headers. Show loading skeleton during fetch.
result_summary:
Committed and verified History Screen implementation (commit 0257983):

**HistoryScreen.tsx:**
- Main screen integrating useTimeEntries infinite query with filters
- Accepts route params for pre-filtering (categoryId, dateStart, dateEnd)
- Entry count display with "+" indicator when hasNextPage
- Error state handling with retry message
- Navigation to EntryEdit modal on entry press
- Uses useCategories hook for category lookups

**HistoryFilters.tsx:**
- Expandable filter panel with active indicator dot
- Date range pickers (YYYY-MM-DD text inputs with validation)
- Category selector modal showing colors AND types
- Notes search input with 300ms debounce (useRef timeout)
- Duration preset chips (< 30m, 30m-1h, 1h-2h, 2h-4h, > 4h)
- Clear all filters button
- Disabled state support during loading

**EntryList.tsx:**
- FlatList with infinite scroll (onEndReachedThreshold=0.3)
- Pull-to-refresh via RefreshControl with themed colors
- Entries grouped by date with section headers (Today/Yesterday/formatted date)
- Loading skeleton during initial fetch (5 placeholder cards)
- Empty state with icon and customizable message
- Performance optimizations (removeClippedSubviews, maxToRenderPerBatch=10, windowSize=5)
- Accessibility (accessibilityRole="list")

**EntryCard.tsx:**
- Category color chip (12px rounded square)
- Category type badge
- Date with Today/Yesterday smart labels
- Start-end time range display (HH:MM 24h format)
- Duration badge with hours/minutes formatting
- Notes preview truncated to 80 chars with ellipsis
- Edit button with Icon component
- Pressable card with onPress support

**Definition of Done:**
- Input validation: Filters validated via TimeEntryFiltersSchema
- Auth: RLS policies enforce user_id server-side
- Error handling: Error state displayed with retry message
- Type safety: npx tsc passes (except unrelated victory-native deps from task-029)
- Git committed: 0257983

Contract registered: "History Screen Components"
